senses.definition: a piece of furniture with shelves or drawers for storing or displaying things

examples.x: The cabinet doors are made of glass, allowing us to see inside.
The shoe cabinet by the entrance keeps our shoes organized and tidy.

senses.definition: a type of cabinet used to store and display china dishes and other collectibles

examples.x: The fine china was carefully arranged in the china cabinet for special occasions.
She admired the beautiful porcelain teacups displayed in the china cabinet.
For the holiday dinner, they took out the dishes from the china cabinet.
The family heirlooms were stored safely in the china cabinet, away from dust.
The antique china cabinet was a cherished piece of furniture in the dining room.

senses.definition: a type of cabinet that consists of a lower cabinet or sideboard with drawers and/or cabinets, and an upper cabinet or open shelves for storage or display
a piece of office furniture with drawers in which documents can be stored

examples.x: She organized the client files in the bottom drawer of the file cabinet.
The file cabinet in the corner of the office contained important documents dating back several years.
He stored confidential paperwork securely in the locked file cabinet.
The administrative assistant retrieved the contract from the file cabinet for the meeting.
The office manager labeled each drawer of the file cabinet for easy access to different categories of files.

senses.definition: a tall, freestanding cabinet with doors that is often used for storing clothing or linens

examples.x: She stored all her winter coats in the armoire to keep them out of sight during the summer.
The antique armoire in the hallway added a touch of elegance to the room.
He opened the armoire and searched for his favorite sweater.
After moving into the new apartment, she placed the armoire in her bedroom for extra storage.
The old armoire, with its intricate carvings, had been passed down through generations.

senses.definition: the built-in furniture installed in many kitchens for storage of food

examples.x: The kitchen cabinet was filled with spices, pots, and pans for cooking.
She stored all of her baking tools in the lower kitchen cabinet for easy access.
The kitchen cabinets were designed with pull-out shelves to maximize storage space.
He had to clean out the kitchen cabinet to make room for the new dishes.
They installed new kitchen cabinets to give the room a more modern look.

senses.definition: a small cabinet with shelves behind a mirrored door, used for storing medicines and first aid supplies

examples.x: She opened the medicine cabinet to grab the pain relievers.
The medicine cabinet was stocked with all the essentials, from bandages to ointments.
He kept his vitamins and cough syrup in the medicine cabinet for easy access.
The mirror on the medicine cabinet made it easier to get ready in the morning.
After cleaning the bathroom, she noticed the medicine cabinet needed organizing.

senses.definition: a furniture or storage unit used for organizing and storing different items, available in various sizes and configurations to fit different needs

examples.x: The garage has a large storage cabinet where I keep all my gardening tools.
He put the extra blankets and pillows in the storage cabinet under the stairs.
They cleaned out the storage cabinet in the hallway to make room for winter coats.
She bought a new storage cabinet to organize her collection of craft supplies.

senses.definition: a type of furniture that is used to showcase or display items such as collectibles, artwork, or decorative objects

examples.x: The antique vase was placed in the display cabinet for everyone to admire.
She carefully arranged her collection of porcelain figurines in the display cabinet.
The display cabinet in the hallway showcased a variety of family photos.
The museum used a display cabinet to exhibit the rare artifacts.
The display cabinet in the dining room held a set of crystal glasses.

senses.definition: a display cabinet made of wood and glass, used to showcase collectibles or valuable items, and often featuring shelves, lighting, and locks

examples.x: She carefully placed her antique china in the curio cabinet to keep it safe and display it beautifully.
The curio cabinet in the living room displayed a collection of rare glass figurines.
He opened the curio cabinet to admire the vintage watches his grandfather had collected.
After years of collecting, she finally arranged her favorite pieces in the curio cabinet for everyone to see.

senses.definition: a storage cabinet used for storing food items, kitchen supplies, and other household goods

examples.x: The pantry cabinet in the kitchen is filled with canned vegetables and pasta.
I need to reorganize the pantry cabinet; it’s getting hard to find anything.
After the grocery shopping, I put everything in the pantry cabinet to keep it organized.
I added extra shelves to the pantry cabinet to store all the baking supplies.
The new pantry cabinet has adjustable shelves, making it easy to store tall items.

senses.definition: a storage cabinet made of durable materials like metal or plastic, designed to help organize and store items in a garage or workshop

examples.x: I store all my gardening tools in the garage cabinet to keep them organized.
The garage cabinet is filled with cleaning supplies and car maintenance products.
After finishing the yard work, I put the rake back in the garage cabinet for safekeeping.
He organized his workshop by adding a few more garage cabinets for extra storage.
The garage cabinet was locked to keep the chemicals and paints out of reach of the children.

senses.definition: a type of furniture designed to fit into the corner of a room, typically in a kitchen or dining room

examples.x: She placed the extra towels in the corner cabinet to keep the bathroom organized.
The kitchen has a corner cabinet that stores all the extra dishes and glasses.
He found the spices he needed in the corner cabinet near the stove.
The corner cabinet in the living room is perfect for displaying her collection of antique vases.
We added a corner cabinet in the laundry room to store cleaning supplies out of sight.

senses.definition: a type of kitchen cabinet that sits on the floor and provides storage space for kitchen items such as dishes, pots, pans, and utensils

examples.x: The base cabinet in the kitchen is perfect for storing all of my pots and pans.
I need to clean out the base cabinet under the sink because it is full of cleaning supplies.
We added a base cabinet with extra drawers for more storage in the bathroom.
The contractor installed a new base cabinet to match the rest of the kitchen cabinets.
The base cabinet in the laundry room holds detergents and other cleaning products.

senses.definition: a type of kitchen cabinet that is mounted on the wall above the countertop or stove

examples.x: The kitchen has several wall cabinets for storing dishes and glassware.
She stored her cleaning supplies in the wall cabinet above the sink.
They installed a wall cabinet in the garage to store tools and small equipment.
The bathroom was fitted with a small wall cabinet to hold toiletries and medicine.
The wall cabinet in the hallway is perfect for storing hats, gloves, and scarves.

senses.definition: a bathroom cabinet that includes a sink and countertop, designed to store personal items and fit in with bathroom decor

examples.x: The bathroom looks much more organized after we installed a new vanity cabinet.
The vanity cabinet has a mirror above it, making it the perfect spot for getting ready in the morning.
She kept all her beauty products in the drawers of the vanity cabinet.
He had to clean out the vanity cabinet because it was filled with old, unused toiletries.
I found extra towels and cleaning supplies tucked away in the vanity cabinet.

senses.definition: a type of furniture designed to store towels, bed linens, and other household items such as blankets, pillows, and tablecloths

examples.x: The linen cabinet in the bathroom holds all of our towels and extra sheets.
She organized her clean towels neatly in the linen cabinet.
The linen cabinet in the hallway was perfect for storing extra blankets.
We keep our guest bed linens in the linen cabinet for easy access.
After folding the towels, she placed them in the linen cabinet to keep everything neat.

senses.definition: a type of small cabinet or chest used for storing wine bottles or other types of spirits

examples.x: The antique cellaret in the dining room was used to store the family's finest bottles of wine.
He placed the bottles of aged whiskey in the cellaret, ready for a special occasion.
The old cellaret, made of mahogany, added a touch of elegance to the living room.
She stored the rare wine collection in a cool, dark cellaret to preserve its quality.
A beautifully carved cellaret stood in the corner, displaying a selection of vintage liquors.

senses.definition: a type of cabinet on wheels that can be easily moved around from one location to another

examples.x: The mobile cabinet in the office makes it easy to store and move files around when needed.
I keep all my kitchen utensils in a mobile cabinet so I can move them closer to the workspace.
We bought a mobile cabinet to store cleaning supplies, which is helpful for quick access in any room.
The office manager uses a mobile cabinet to organize paperwork and move it to different departments.
The mobile cabinet in the classroom holds art supplies, and I can easily move it to any area of the room.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture designed to support a television and its related components such as a cable box, DVD player, or game console
a furniture unit designed for organizing and storing electronic entertainment devices

examples.x: We recently bought a new entertainment center to replace the old one, and it has more space for DVDs and books.
The entertainment center was custom-made to fit the size of the room and includes compartments for all our media devices.
She placed her favorite decorations on top of the entertainment center, adding a personal touch to the space.
They moved the entertainment center to the other side of the room to create a better viewing angle for the television.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture used for storing dishes, table linens, and other dining or serving items

examples.x: She placed the silverware neatly in the drawers of the sideboard.
The sideboard in the dining room was filled with antique china.
We used the top of the sideboard to display family photos during the party.
The sideboard was perfect for storing extra table linens and napkins.
He added a fresh vase of flowers to the sideboard to brighten up the room.

senses.definition: a type of closet that is designed to be shallow and typically has a single door, making it easy to reach and access items stored inside

examples.x: The reach-in closet in the hallway was perfect for storing coats and shoes.
I need to clear out my reach-in closet; it's getting too crowded with winter clothes.
He added a few hooks inside the reach-in closet for scarves and hats.
The reach-in closet in the guest room was small but efficient for holding extra bedding and towels.
The builder installed a reach-in closet to save space in the small bedroom.

senses.definition: a storage space typically located in a hallway, used for storing coats, shoes, bags, and other items related to entering or exiting a home

examples.x: The hallway closet is perfect for storing our coats and shoes during the winter months.
She hung her jacket in the hallway closet before heading to the kitchen.
The hallway closet is small, but it’s perfect for storing our seasonal items.
I keep extra towels and bed linens in the hallway closet for easy access.
We decided to reorganize the hallway closet to make room for the new vacuum cleaner.

senses.definition: a freestanding, often stationary, countertop and cabinet unit situated in the center of a kitchen that provides additional storage, workspace, and seating

examples.x: The kitchen island provides extra counter space for meal preparation and cooking.
We decided to add a kitchen island to make our kitchen more functional.
The kitchen island also has seating on one side, perfect for casual meals.
A sink was installed in the kitchen island to make washing dishes more convenient.
They chose a modern kitchen island with sleek design and built-in appliances.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture consisted of a number of drawers primarily used for keeping clothing

examples.x: She stored her clothes neatly in the chest of drawers by the bed.
The chest of drawers in the hallway was perfect for keeping household items organized.
He found an antique chest of drawers at the flea market that was perfect for their bedroom.
The nursery was equipped with a small chest of drawers for the baby's clothes and accessories.
They decided to paint the old chest of drawers to match their new décor.

senses.definition: a sliding box-shaped piece of furniture found within a desk, dresser, or cabinet, used for organizing and storing items

examples.x: She keeps her socks and underwear neatly folded in the top drawer of her dresser.
He rummaged through the desk drawer to find a pen and paper to jot down a quick note.
The bottom drawer of the filing cabinet is used for storing old documents and files.

senses.definition: a storage unit that fits under a bed to save space and store items

examples.x: She stored her extra blankets in the under-bed drawer to keep her closet organized.
The under-bed drawer is perfect for hiding away seasonal clothing that is not in use.
I found some old books in the under-bed drawer that I had forgotten about.
They used the under-bed drawer to store their shoes and free up space in the closet.
He slid open the under-bed drawer and pulled out his favorite sweater.

senses.definition: a type of storage unit that fits inside a closet and provides drawers for storing clothing, accessories, or other personal items

examples.x: She stored her sweaters in the closet drawer to keep them organized and wrinkle-free.
The closet drawer is perfect for holding accessories like scarves and hats.
He found his favorite pair of socks in the closet drawer beside his shoes.
The closet drawer was filled with neatly folded shirts and jeans.
I keep my jewelry in the closet drawer to keep it safe and easy to find.

senses.definition: a small table or cabinet next to a bed for storing personal items, often with drawers or shelves

examples.x: She placed her reading glasses and a glass of water on the nightstand before going to sleep.
The nightstand had a small drawer where he kept his wallet and keys.
He reached over to the nightstand to turn off the alarm clock.
The nightstand was a perfect match for the bed frame, adding to the room's cozy feel.
She kept a photo of her family on the nightstand as a reminder of home.

senses.definition: a large piece of furniture made of wood  with cupboards and drawers  in the lower part and long shelves for storing and displaying dishes on the top

examples.x: The antique Welsh dresser in the dining room was filled with delicate china and crystal glasses.
She carefully arranged her grandmother’s tea set on the open shelves of the Welsh dresser.
The Welsh dresser had a rustic charm, making it the perfect centerpiece in the cozy cottage kitchen.
After dinner, the plates were neatly stacked on the Welsh dresser, ready for the next meal.
He opened the drawers of the Welsh dresser to find the silverware for the dinner party.

senses.definition: a short and wide chest of drawers or dressing table with legs, typically used in bedrooms

examples.x: She placed her favorite vase on top of the lowboy, adding a touch of elegance to the room.
The lowboy in the bedroom has a smooth, dark wood finish that complements the modern decor.
He kept his collection of vintage watches on the top of the lowboy as a display.
I found an old lowboy at the flea market, and it was just what I needed for extra storage.
The lowboy has several drawers, which are great for organizing my jewelry and small accessories.

senses.definition: the main structure of the cabinet that consists of sides, top, bottom, and back panel

examples.x: The cabinet box is made of sturdy plywood, ensuring it will last for many years.
Before installing the shelves, the carpenter made sure the cabinet box was level.
The cabinet box is the foundation of the kitchen unit, with doors and drawers attached to it.
To improve the kitchen’s design, we decided to upgrade the cabinet box with soft-close hinges.
The cabinet box was assembled in the workshop before being delivered to the home.

senses.definition: a compartment that slides in and out of the cabinet box and is used for storing items

examples.x: The carpenter carefully assembled the drawer box before attaching the front panel.
The drawer box was filled with kitchen utensils, making it easy to find what I needed.
He had to replace the broken drawer box in the filing cabinet with a new one.
The drawer box slides in and out smoothly thanks to the quality tracks.
She organized all of her clothes into different drawer boxes to keep everything tidy.

senses.definition: a hardware component that facilitates the smooth sliding of the drawer boxes in and out of the cabinet box

examples.x: The drawer slide makes it easy to open and close the drawer without any resistance.
The carpenter replaced the broken drawer slide to ensure the drawer worked smoothly.
The smoothness of the drawer slide is a key feature of high-end furniture.
The drawer slides are made of high-quality steel, ensuring durability over time.
She had to oil the drawer slide to prevent it from squeaking every time it was opened.

senses.definition: a hardware component that connects the doors to the cabinet box, allowing them to swing open and closed
a recessed area at the base of the cabinet, allowing a person to stand closer to the cabinet without hitting their toes
a sturdy container in the form of a box that is primarily used for storing or transporting one's possessions
a piece of furniture containing several drawers, usually for keeping clothes

examples.x: She kept her sweaters neatly folded in the top drawer of the dresser.
The antique dresser had a beautiful wood finish and brass handles.
The dresser came with a matching mirror for the bedroom set.
He struggled to move the heavy dresser up the stairs.
The child’s toys were stored in the bottom drawers of the dresser.

senses.definition: a small space or room built into a wall, which is used to store things and is usually shelved

examples.x: She stored her clothes and shoes neatly in the closet.
The closet had a light that automatically turned on when the door was opened.
In the closet, she discovered a collection of vintage dresses and nostalgic memories.
A mysterious noise echoed from the closet, sparking her curiosity and a hint of apprehension.
His favorite childhood toys were hidden away in the closet, waiting for the next generation.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture with shelves and doors, usually built into a wall, designed for storing things like foods, dishes, etc.

examples.x: She found the cereal in the kitchen cupboard, right above the stove.
The cups and plates were neatly stacked inside the cupboard.
He opened the cupboard to grab some snacks for the movie night.
The cleaning supplies were stored in a cupboard under the sink.
They decided to install a new cupboard in the pantry for extra storage.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture that is large and is used for hanging and storing clothes

examples.x: She hung her dresses neatly inside the spacious wardrobe.
The old wardrobe had been in the family for generations.
He opened the wardrobe to find a jacket for the evening.
They bought a new wardrobe to organize all their clothes.
The wardrobe's doors were decorated with intricate carvings.
